user.title: Set up ProxLab
user.description: Quick setup — configure connections and roles in integration options after setup. Check 'Connect to ProxLab' for automatic service discovery.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this ProxLab instance
data_description.connect_proxlab: Enable automatic service discovery through ProxLab

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to ProxLab. Please check the URL and network connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your credentials.
error.invalid_config: Invalid configuration. Please check your settings.
error.invalid_url: Invalid base URL format. Please enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This ProxLab instance is already configured.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance of ProxLab is allowed.

init.title: ProxLab Configuration
init.description:
ProxLab is configured through its dedicated sidebar panel.

Click **ProxLab** in the sidebar (robot icon) or navigate to [{panel_url}]({panel_url}) to manage connections, agents, and all settings.

connections.title: Connections
connections.description: Select a connection to edit, or create a new one.

data_description.connection: Choose a connection to edit or create a new one

add_connection_type.title: New Connection
add_connection_type.description: Choose the type of connection to add.

data_description.connection_type: Local Connection for self-hosted endpoints, or Claude API for Anthropic's cloud models

add_connection.title: Add Connection
add_connection.description: Define a new endpoint connection. Select one or more capabilities that this endpoint supports.

data_description.import_from_proxlab: Pre-fill connection details from a discovered ProxLab service
data_description.name: A friendly name for this connection (e.g., 'KoboldCpp V100')
data_description.base_url: API base URL up to /v1 (e.g., http://10.0.0.222:5001/v1). Do not include /chat/completions — it is added automatically.
data_description.api_key: API key for authentication (leave empty for local endpoints)
data_description.model: Model name to use (e.g., qwen3-coder, tts-1, whisper-1)
data_description.capabilities: What this endpoint can do — determines which roles it can fill

connection_details.title: Connection Details: {connection_name}
connection_details.description: Configure type-specific settings based on the selected capabilities.

data_description.keep_alive: How long to keep model loaded (e.g., 5m, 1h)
data_description.proxy_headers: Optional custom HTTP headers as JSON
data_description.thinking_enabled: Strip thinking blocks from model responses and append /no_think for Qwen3
data_description.voice: Default voice for speech synthesis. Fetched automatically from the server when available.
data_description.embedding_provider: Choose between OpenAI or Ollama for embeddings

add_connection_claude.title: Claude API Connection
add_connection_claude.description: Configure a connection to Anthropic's Claude API.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this connection (e.g., 'Claude Sonnet')

edit_connection.title: Edit Connection: {connection_name}
edit_connection.description: Modify connection settings. Check 'Delete' at the bottom to remove this connection.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this connection
data_description.base_url: API base URL up to /v1 — do not include /chat/completions
data_description.model: Model name or ID to use
data_description.keep_alive: How long to keep model loaded
data_description.proxy_headers: Optional custom HTTP headers as JSON
data_description.thinking_enabled: Strip thinking blocks from model responses and append /no_think for Qwen3
data_description.__delete__: Check this box and submit to permanently delete this connection and unassign its roles

agents.title: Agents
agents.description: Select an agent to configure. Primary agents must have a primary connection assigned.

data_description.agent: Choose an agent to view or configure

data_description.enabled: Enable or disable this optional agent
data_description.primary_connection: Main connection used by this agent
data_description.secondary_connection: Optional fallback connection if primary is unavailable
data_description.system_prompt: Instructions that guide this agent's behavior
data_description.restore_default_prompt: Check this box and submit to reset the prompt to the built-in default

confirm_agent_disable.title: Disable {agent_name}?
confirm_agent_disable.description: This agent has connections configured. Are you sure you want to disable it? Your connections and prompt will be preserved.

data_description.enable_instead: Check this to keep the agent enabled with the connections you configured

memory_settings_gated.title: Memory System
memory_settings_gated.description: The Memory System requires the Memory and Embeddings agents to be enabled and configured with primary connections. Go to Agents to set them up.

vector_db_settings_gated.title: Vector Database
vector_db_settings_gated.description: The Vector Database requires the Embeddings agent to be enabled and configured with a primary connection. Go to Agents to set it up.

proxlab_settings.title: ProxLab Service Discovery
proxlab_settings.description: Configure ProxLab DV-Lab URL for automatic discovery of services when adding connections.

data_description.proxlab_url: ProxLab DV-Lab URL (e.g., http://10.0.0.233:7777). Leave empty to disable discovery.

context_settings.title: Context Settings
context_settings.description: Configure how entity context is provided to the LLM.

data_description.context_mode: Choose how to inject entity context
data_description.context_format: Format for entity data (JSON, Natural Language, or Hybrid)
data_description.direct_entities: Comma-separated list of entity IDs (e.g., sensor.temperature,light.*)
data_description.max_context_tokens: Maximum total tokens for context. Default: 8000.

vector_db_settings.title: Vector Database
vector_db_settings.description: Set up or manage your vector database backend for semantic entity search.

data_description.vector_db_action: Choose a backend to set up, or edit/remove an existing one

vector_db_configure.title: Configure {backend_name}
vector_db_configure.description: Configure the connection and search settings for your vector database.

data_description.vector_db_collection: Name of the collection for entity embeddings
data_description.vector_db_top_k: Number of most relevant entities to retrieve
data_description.vector_db_similarity_threshold: Maximum L2 distance threshold for results

vector_db_delete.title: Remove Vector Database
vector_db_delete.description: This will remove all vector database configuration. Your data in the database will not be deleted.

data_description.confirm_delete: Check this box and submit to remove the vector database configuration

data_description.history_enabled: Include previous conversation turns in LLM context
data_description.history_max_messages: Maximum number of conversation turns to retain
data_description.session_persistence_enabled: Maintain conversation context across multiple voice interactions
data_description.session_timeout: Time in minutes before voice sessions expire (1-120)

tool_settings.title: Tool Configuration
tool_settings.description: Configure tool execution limits and timeouts.

data_description.tools_max_calls_per_turn: Maximum tool executions per conversation turn
data_description.tools_timeout: Maximum execution time per tool call

memory_settings.title: Memory System Configuration
memory_settings.description: Configure the long-term memory system for persistent learning across conversations.

data_description.memory_enabled: Privacy toggle - enable or disable the entire memory system
data_description.memory_universal_access: When enabled, the agent can access all users' memories. When disabled, only the current user's memories and global memories are used.
data_description.memory_max_memories: Maximum number of memories to store
data_description.memory_min_words: Minimum words required for a memory
data_description.memory_context_top_k: How many relevant memories to include per conversation
data_description.memory_collection_name: Name of the vector DB collection for memory indexing

data_description.debug_logging: Enable detailed logging for troubleshooting (may expose sensitive data)
data_description.streaming_enabled: Enable streaming responses for low-latency TTS integration

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Please check the URL and network connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your credentials.
error.invalid_config: Invalid configuration. Please check your settings.
error.external_llm_required: Memory extraction with external LLM requires the External LLM role to be assigned.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the logs.

reindex_entities.name: Reindex entities
reindex_entities.description: Force a full reindex of all Home Assistant entities into the vector database.

index_entity.name: Index entity
index_entity.description: Index a specific entity into the vector database.

clear_conversation.name: Clear conversation
clear_conversation.description: Clear conversation session and start fresh with no previous context.
